case_title: CRESCENT JEWELRYS INC. VS TOLENTINO, FIDELL

docket_entries.description: PETITION OF JUDGMENT CREDITOR TO SET ASIDE TERMS FOR PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CRESCENT JEWELRYS INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY CRESCENT JEWELRYS INC. AS TO DEFENDANT TOLENTINO, FIDELL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-18-1987 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO SET ASIDE TERMS OF MAR-26-1993, DENIED
MOTION TO SET ASIDE TERMS FILED BY DEFENDANT TOLENTINO, FIDELL HEARING SET FOR MAR-26-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 07

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CRESCENT JEWELRYS INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TOLENTINO, FIDELL $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $34.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,534.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
